# daytona_admin_recover_sandbox (Action)

Recovers a Daytona sandbox from an error state using Daytona admin APIs.



<!-- action schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `sandbox_id` (String) Daytona sandbox ID to recover.
